heading.title: AI Providers
heading.subtitle: Configure AI model integrations to power automated features across your servers.

create.title: New AI Provider
create.detailsHint: Give a descriptive name so you can identify which model and provider this entry represents.
create.configHint: Select the provider and enter the model name and API key. The key is stored encrypted.
create.reviewHint: Confirm everything looks correct before saving.

placeholder.name: e.g. GPT-4o Production
placeholder.description: What this provider is used for…

hint.apiKeyProtected: API key is encrypted and cannot be retrieved after saving.
hint.baseUrlOptional: Leave empty to use the provider's default endpoint.
hint.deleteWarning: This will permanently remove the provider configuration.

empty.noProviders: No AI providers yet. Click New provider to add one.

confirm.deleteMessage: This AI provider configuration will be permanently removed.
